/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui.a CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/ImGui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/ImGui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/ImGui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/ImGui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/ImGui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/ImGui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui.a
